a little late · always on time in my heart

🕯️

I know your birthday already passed — but some things are worth celebrating a little late.

You deserve confetti and cake and all of it.

And even though we've only just started talking, I'm really glad I get to be someone who knows you exist. That feels like its own kind of gift. 🌸
